entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum, the focus of the genetic variation map and breeding strategies

entities.name: GERMPLASM RESOURCES
entities.description: Genetic materials used for conservation, characterization, and utilization

entities.name: PAN-GENOME
entities.description: A genome representing the entire genetic diversity across cultivated and wild accessions of a species

entities.name: DIVERGENCE TREE
entities.description: A tool used to estimate the evolutionary divergence of Cicer over 21 million years

entities.name: DOMESTICATION
entities.description: The process of adapting wild plants for human use, showing signatures of selection

entities.name: MIGRATION
entities.description: The movement of plant populations, showing signatures of selection

entities.name: IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing crop traits through selection

entities.name: DELETERIOUS MUTATIONS
entities.description: Harmful genetic changes that limit genetic diversity and decrease fitness

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the maximal set of distinct genotypes

entities.name: FITNESS
entities.description: The ability of an organism to survive and reproduce

entities.name: SUPERIOR HAPLOTYPES
entities.description: Specific combinations of alleles associated with improvement-related traits

entities.name: IMPROVEMENT-RELATED TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of the crop targeted for enhancement in breeding

entities.name: HAPLOTYPE-BASED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach using specific haplotypes to improve elite breeding lines

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: Breeding using genomic data to target and purge deleterious alleles

entities.name: GENE EDITING
entities.description: Precise modification of the genome to purge deleterious alleles

entities.name: GENOMIC PREDICTION
entities.description: Using genomic data to predict the performance of traits to enhance productivity

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output and yield

entities.name: OCS-BASED PRE-BREEDING
entities.description: Optimal contribution selection used to enhance productivity while avoiding the erosion of genetic diversity

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: A specific yield-related trait used to measure the performance of breeding approaches

entities.name: YIELD-RELATED TRAIT
entities.description: Traits that directly or indirectly affect the total yield of the crop
